stemHtml: What effect does the inclination of the Earth's spin axis have on the average daytime temperatures in January and July over inland areas of Country A (25°N) and Country B (25°S)?

options.a: Country A will be colder than Country B in July and hotter in January.
options.b: Country A will be hotter than Country B in July and colder in January.
options.c: Average temperatures in Country A will be similar to those in Country B in both months.
options.d: Country A will be hotter than Country B in July and also in January.
